scripts.build: pnpm run build:wrapper && pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:client
scripts.build:prod: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:wrapper:prod && pnpm run build:server:prod && pnpm run build:client
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @caijimmy/jsoniq-language-server run clean && mvn -f packages/rumble-lsp-wrapper/pom.xml -q clean && pnpm --filter @caijimmy/jsoniq-vscode-extension run clean
